arts.ttl: Referee named for Champions League match between Real Madrid and Brest
arts.sum: UEFA have appointed Norwegian referee Espen Ekas as the man in charge of Wednesday’s match between Brest and Real Madrid in the last day of this year’s Champions League ’s Group Stage. Espen Eskås will referee the game between Real Madrid and Brest in the Champions League at the Stade du Roudourou (Wednesday, 9 pm CET).

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Brest
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s match against Brest in the Champions League . Alaba could get some more minutes if Real Madrid get an early lead.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star named La Liga U23 Player of the Month
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham has on Tuesday secured for himself a fresh piece of silverware. This comes amid confirmation that the Englishman has been named the La Liga U23…

arts.ttl: Saudi Pro League lining up world record offer for Vinicius Junior
arts.sum: Real Madrid winger Vinicius Junior continues to be the subject of transfer interest from Saudi Arabia, with a fresh report of a world record offer being prepared for the summer.

arts.ttl: Will Jude Bellingham eclipse Messi or Mbappe's Champions League feat?
arts.sum: After a slow start to the season, Jude Bellingham has rediscovered his form to showcase his unquestionable ability. The Englishman was a revelation during his first season in Spain,...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, West Ham learn Jhon Duran asking price ahead of transfer deadline?
arts.sum: Aston Villa are reportedly demanding at least £80m for Jhon Duran, amid interest in the Colombian striker from Real Madrid and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid mega transfer is ‘98% done’
arts.sum: Real Madrid's deal to sign Trent Alexander- Arnold on a free transfer is '98 per cent done'. Real Madrid have reportedly offered Trent Alexander-Arnold a contract worth a staggering €90 million.

arts.ttl: WhoScored's European Team of the Week: Barcelona, Real Madrid, Newcastle, Liverpool
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Fermin Lopez is the European Player of the Week after the Blaugrana smashed Valencia on Sunday night. Getafe, Le Havre, Genoa, Montpellier, Lens, St. Pauli, Liverpool, Bournemouth...

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid are suddenly angry with what's happening with Trent Alexander-Arnold
How Real Madrid Can Qualify for the Champions League Round of 16
arts.sum: Real Madrid need to defeat Brest and hope many results swing in their favor to automatically qualify for the Champions League round of 16.
